questions.q: What major addition was announced for the upcoming theatrical re-release of 'Avengers: Endgame' ahead of 'Doomsday'?
According to producer Emma Thomas, what was confirmed about Christopher Nolan's upcoming film 'The Odyssey'?
options: It will have a runtime under 3 hours
It will be filmed entirely in black and white
It will have a PG rating
questions.correctText: It will have a runtime under 3 hours

questions.q: Which two actresses were newly announced as the leads for Disney’s upcoming animated feature 'Hexed'?
Which upcoming animated movie recently suffered a massive hacker leak of the entire film months before its premiere?
options: Legend of Aang: The Last Airbender
Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Future Shock
questions.correctText: Legend of Aang: The Last Airbender
